message:
Add a dedicated OCSF agent skill (#235)

Split skill generation into separate tenzir and ocsf outputs so
the main Tenzir skill stays shallow while the OCSF reference
ships as its own package. Add a regression test, validate both
skills in CI, and document the updated workflow.

files.patch:
@@ -35,6 +35,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
+      - name: Verify skill generation
+        run: bun run test:skill-generation
+
       - name: Restore Astro cache
         uses: actions/cache@v4
         with:
@@ -256,7 +259,8 @@ jobs:
       - name: Build skill
         run: |
           bun run build:skill
-          tar -czf tenzir-skill.tar.gz -C tenzir .
+          tar -czf tenzir-skill.tar.gz tenzir
+          tar -czf ocsf-skill.tar.gz ocsf
 
       - name: Install uv
         uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
@@ -265,6 +269,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           uv tool install git+https://github.com/agentskills/agentskills.git#subdirectory=skills-ref
           skills-ref validate tenzir
+          skills-ref validate ocsf
 
       - name: Delete existing release assets
         run: |
@@ -288,11 +293,13 @@ jobs:
             **Download:**
             - 📦 [`tenzir-docs.tar.gz`](https://github.com/tenzir/docs/releases/download/latest/tenzir-docs.tar.gz): Structured directory of markdown files
             - 📄 [`tenzir-docs.md`](https://github.com/tenzir/docs/releases/download/latest/tenzir-docs.md): Single file with proper heading hierarchy
-            - 🤖 [`tenzir-skill.tar.gz`](https://github.com/tenzir/docs/releases/download/latest/tenzir-skill.tar.gz): [Agent Skill](https://agentskills.io) with progressive disclosure
+            - 🤖 [`tenzir-skill.tar.gz`](https://github.com/tenzir/docs/releases/download/latest/tenzir-skill.tar.gz): Tenzir [Agent Skill](https://agentskills.io) without the OCSF reference
+            - 🤖 [`ocsf-skill.tar.gz`](https://github.com/tenzir/docs/releases/download/latest/ocsf-skill.tar.gz): Dedicated OCSF [Agent Skill](https://agentskills.io) rooted at the OCSF reference
 
             *Auto-generated on ${{ env.TIMESTAMP }} from commit [`${{ github.sha }}`](https://github.com/tenzir/docs/commit/${{ github.sha }})*
           files: |
             tenzir-docs.tar.gz
             tenzir-docs.md
             tenzir-skill.tar.gz
+            ocsf-skill.tar.gz
           make_latest: true

@@ -36,5 +36,7 @@ tenzir-docs.md
 dev.log
 
 # Generated skill output
-tenzir-skill/
+tenzir/
+ocsf/
 tenzir-skill.tar.gz
+ocsf-skill.tar.gz

@@ -109,9 +109,12 @@ Some content is auto-generated and excluded from linting:
   `bun run generate:ocsf:all` for all versions. Fetches schema from schema.ocsf.io
   and articles from ocsf/ocsf-docs. Generated files: `src/content/docs/reference/ocsf/`,
   `src/sidebar-ocsf.generated.ts`, `src/ocsf-version.mjs`.
-- **Agent Skill**: Run `bun run build:skill` to generate the Tenzir agent skill.
-  Requires `bun run build:full` first to generate per-page markdown files in `dist/`.
-  Generated files: `tenzir-skill/SKILL.md`, `tenzir-skill/<doc-hierarchy>/`.
+- **Agent Skills**: Run `bun run build:skill` to generate the `tenzir/` and
+  `ocsf/` agent skills. Requires `bun run build:full` first to generate
+  per-page markdown files in `dist/`. Generated files: `tenzir/SKILL.md`,
+  `tenzir/<doc-hierarchy>/`, `ocsf/SKILL.md`, `ocsf/<ocsf-doc-hierarchy>/`.
+  Run `bun run test:skill-generation` after changing the skill generator or
+  skill content splitting logic.
 
 ### Linting

@@ -25,6 +25,7 @@
     "lint:prettier": "prettier --check '**/*.{md,mdx}'",
     "lint:prettier:fix": "prettier --write '**/*.{md,mdx}'",
     "test:inline-partials": "bun run scripts/verify-inline-partials.ts",
+    "test:skill-generation": "node scripts/verify-skill-generation.mjs",
     "build:linkcheck": "CHECK_LINKS=true bun run build",
     "build:full": "bun run generate && CHECK_LINKS=true LLMS_TXT=true bun run build",
     "build:skill": "node scripts/generate-skill.mjs",
